_schema.description: License compliance allowlist for B41 supply chain (scripts/check-licenses.mjs). allowed_licenses lists SPDX identifiers cleared for production use. allowed_packages lists specific packages that may carry an unusual or unknown license, with documented reason.

fields.allowed_packages: Map of package-name -> reason/owner/expires for exceptions

allowed_packages.name: posthog-js
allowed_packages.reason: License is MIT — declared as 'SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE' in package.json. Verified upstream.
